contact.title: Contact
contact.subtitle: I'm here to help — don't hesitate to reach out!
contact.bio:
My name is Anabel Rodríguez, and from my home I bring Ani’s Artisan Bakery to life — a space where I bake with heart.

What began as a passion grew into a micro‑bakery where I share handcrafted cookies and sourdough bread, made with care, patience, and respect for the process.

I believe in the power of food to bring people together, and each creation is a way to connect with my community and bring a little happiness to their table.

footer.copy: Ani's Artisan Bakery · Homemade Baked Goods · Made with ♥
